title: Afrotrilepis pilosa
taxonomy: Afrotrilepis pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Afrotrilepis, which is a group of plants endemic to tropical Africa. The plant is further classified as belonging to the subfamily Cyperoideae and the tribe Cypereae. The classification of Afrotrilepis pilosa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Cyperaceae family. This classification system is used to organize and understand the diversity of plant life.
